title: DimensionalRPG2: NEW HORIZON
description:
This mod is the sequel to dimensionalRPG
adds new armor materials, weapons, and tools
and multiple dimensions
New updates coming soon
body:
рҹ’¬ Join our Discord Community!
рҹ‘ү https://discord.gg/P3qcxc8jHZ

Welcome to DimensionalRPG: New Horizon вҖ” an ambitious Minecraft mod packed with new content, weapons, armor, dimensions, and adventures!

On our official Discord server, you can:
рҹ§  Ask for help with your mods or ideas
рҹҺЁ Showcase your creations and get feedback
рҹӨқ Collaborate with other modders and artists
рҹ‘Җ Get exclusive sneak peeks and chat with other players

Join us and become part of a growing community of creators and players passionate about Minecraft modding!

рҹҢҢвҡ”пёҸ DimensionalRPG 2: NEW HORIZON вҡ”пёҸрҹҢҢ

рҹҡҖ A new era of Minecraft has begun!
This is the second generation of the DimensionalRPG saga рҹ’ҺвңЁ вҖ” an epic RPG expansion that will take your world to a level never seen before!

вҡЎ MAIN FEATURES

рҹҢҚ 7 New Dimensions
рҹҢі 7 New Trees & Wood Types, with additional building and decorative blocks to discover
рҹ’Һ Over 60 Unique New Materials
рҹӣЎпёҸ Complete Armor, Weapon & Tool Sets
вңЁ Special Effects & Unique Powers
рҹҸ° Bosses, Structures, and much more to explore
вҡ”пёҸ A balance between classic materials and truly OP gear
Professionally designed mobs, bosses, decorative items, and crafting resources, with 3D modeling and smooth animations

рҹҢҢ NEW DIMENSIONS

рҹ”ҘрҹҢӢ Inferno вҖ“ a blazing and hostile realm full of secrets, challenges, and incredible loot.
вҡ« Shadowrealm вҖ“ a dark world crawling with danger.
рҹҹ© Corrupted World вҖ“ a twisted land consumed by corruption and chaos.
рҹҹӘ Voidream вҖ“ an abstract, surreal realm similar to the End (beware the void!).
рҹҹҰ Glacium вҖ“ a completely frozen world filled with mysteries.
рҹҚӯ Candyland вҖ“ a surreal, colorful dimension packed with sweet surprises.
рҹҸңпёҸ Desertum вҖ“ an ancient and scorching desert full of ruins and hidden treasures.

рҹҢі NEW NATURE

рҹҢІ Discover brand-new trees and wood types вҖ” fresh resources for unique builds and advanced crafting!
Explore the various dimensions to find all wood types and building/decorative blocks scattered across the worlds.

рҹ’Һ LEGENDARY MATERIALS

Over 60 completely new materials, each with its own full armor, sword, and tool set вҡ’пёҸрҹӣЎпёҸ.
Many come with special abilities, such as extreme resistance, super speed, night vision, slow falling, or elemental powers.

вңЁ Highlights include:
рҹ©ёрҹҢ‘ BloodShadownite вҖ“ the dark fusion of Bloodnite and Shadownite, reborn stronger than ever.
рҹҢӢрҹ”Ҙ Infernus вҖ“ raw lava power forged into mighty gear.
вҳЈпёҸрҹ’Җ Toxite вҖ“ a deadly toxic core. DonвҖҷt hold the ingot too longвҖҰ or perish!
рҹҢҖвҡЎ Volatarium вҖ“ grants incredible speed and super jump.
вҳ пёҸрҹ”® Necrothium вҖ“ extremely powerful, infused with multiple dark abilities.
вқ„пёҸрҹ§Ҡ Glacium вҖ“ frozen essence crystallized into strength.
рҹӘЁвҡ’пёҸ Magnus вҖ“ heavy, dense, and mighty.
рҹҢ рҹ’« Starcrystal вҖ“ pure starlight condensed into crystal.
рҹҗүрҹ”Ҙ Drakonite вҖ“ the ancient, blazing power of dragons.

рҹ”· CLASSIC & REVAMPED MATERIALS

Alongside the new materials, youвҖҷll also find classic gems and metals, each with its own full set:

рҹ”ө Cobalt
вҳўпёҸ Uranium
рҹҹҰ Aetherium
рҹҹЁ Topaz
вқӨпёҸ Ruby
рҹ’ҡ Emerald (Full Set)
рҹ’ң Amethyst (Full Set)
рҹ’  Tourmaline
рҹ©ё Crimsonite
вҡҷпёҸ Steel
вҡЎ Nickel
рҹҹў Peridot
рҹ©ё Bloodnite
рҹҢ‘ Shadownite
рҹҘү Bronze
рҹ”® Void Gem

рҹ‘ү With DimensionalRPG 2: New Horizon, Minecraft becomes a true mineral-based RPG, where every resource tells a story and every set unlocks new possibilities.
рҹҢҹ Are you ready to become a legend and defeat every threat standing in your way? рҹҢҹ
